portal.title: Certificate Portal
portal.subtitle: Look up and download your certificate

errors.not_found: No certificate found for the provided details.
errors.captcha_invalid: Captcha is incorrect — please try again.
errors.rate_limited: Too many attempts. Please wait a moment before retrying.
errors.expired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
errors.server: Something went wrong. Please try again.

shipment.title: Track your certificate shipment
shipment.subtitle: Check the delivery status of your certificate.
shipment.identity_hint: Enter your name or phone number to confirm it's you.
shipment.identity_hint_name: Enter your name to confirm it's you.
shipment.not_found: No shipment found. Check your details and try again.

verify.title: Certificate Verification
verify.subtitle: Scan the QR from a printed certificate to confirm authenticity.
verify.tampered: Signature does not match — certificate may be altered.
